## 📋 8 measurement Commands Found

---

### **1. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:RESUlts:ALLAcqs:POPUlation**

**📋 Description:** This query-only command returns the population measurement value for measurement

**📖 Details:** This query-only command returns the population measurement value for measurement <x>.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:RESUlts:ALLAcqs:POPUlation?`

**🔧 Type:** query

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
---

### **2. MEASUrement:RESUlts:HISTory:STARt**

**📋 Description:** This command sets or queries the starting acquisition number for transferring me

**📖 Details:** This command sets or queries the starting acquisition number for transferring measurement history results.

**⚙️ Syntax:** `MEASUrement:RESUlts:HISTory:STARt <NR1>`

**🔧 Type:** both

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7

**📋 Description:** This query-only command returns the mean value for all accumulated measurement a

**📖 Details:** This query-only command returns the mean value for all accumulated measurement acquisitions for measurement <x>.
